results.description: saf/ public function return types depend on crate extensibility: if spi/ exists, return `impl Trait` for downstream polymorphism; if spi/ does not exist, return concrete types only (no trait leaks)

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` where `SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` to `pub(crate) trait SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` and remove this pub fn returning it

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl Validator` where `Validator` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait Validator` to `pub(crate) trait Validator` and remove this pub fn returning it

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` where `SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` to `pub(crate) trait SweEdgeRuntimeResourcePolicy` and remove this pub fn returning it

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl Validator` where `Validator` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait Validator` to `pub(crate) trait Validator` and remove this pub fn returning it

results.description: saf/ methods must not be thin wrappers — a saf/ method whose entire body delegates to a free function or another method adds no value and signals incomplete consolidation
